title: Development Control Plane Phase 3A — Dashboard
purpose: Generated development dashboard: roadmap.html, roadmap-data.json, status-summary.md, next-agent-handoff.md. Area→Initiative→Milestone hierarchy. Staleness checks.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Dashboard shows current project state, subsystem maturity, milestone board

evidence.note: Dashboard renders current project state, subsystem maturity cards, and milestone board from canonical records.
Machine-readable dashboard data includes projectState, subsystemMaturity, milestoneBoard, and git state.
Validation scoreboard is derived from canonical validation records directory and correctly renders empty state when none exist.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Staleness checks detect missing references, stale validation, orphaned state

evidence.note: Staleness checks verify: active milestone without session, paused without handoff, delivered without PR, completed with blockers, stale validation, missing references, stale generated files.
Dashboard correctly reports 0 warnings for clean state and surfaces issues when they exist.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Next-agent handoff generated from canonical state

evidence.note: Handoff is generated from canonical project state, active milestone, session, validation records, and Git state.
